name: Apple Blueberry Crumble Pie
recipeInstructions:
For the pastry, place flour, butter, cream cheese and sugar in a bowl of food processor. Process for 15-20 seconds or until dough forms a soft ball on blade. Gather into a ball, flatten into a disk if necessary, wrap and chill until firm enough to roll. On a lightly floured surface, roll out dough to 9-inch thickness. Line a 9-inch pie plate with dough. Trim edges. Chill while preparing the filling.
For the filling: toss apples and blueberries in a bowl with sugar and cinnamon until evenly coated. Sprinkle breadcrumbs over the bottom of the pie shell; fill with fruit mixture, mounded in the center. For the crumble, combine flour, brown sugar, butter and cinnamon in a food processor. Pat crumble mixture evenly over filling. Bake in a 400°F oven for about 45 minutes or until apples are tender and juices are bubbling, shielding with foil if necessary.
